schema.name: ganglior.node-export
schema.doc: Single-signal wrist-PPG node. Floating wall-clock tMs (Clock Contract). Single-site → no SpO₂/PTT/BP; 2-site fusion lives in the Integrator.

time.windowNote: sdnn/rmssd are whole-record (single-site PPG); per-5-min values live in epochs[]. Directly comparable to another node’s wholeRecord SDNN/RMSSD.
